subject: Mathematics
title: Geometric Sequences
description: Learn Geometric Sequences in one minute.

hook.text: Multiply by the same number each time: 2, 6, 18, 54. The ratio is always 3.

buildup.text: This is a geometric sequence. The constant multiplier is the common ratio.

discovery.text: The nth term is a times r to the power of (n-1). Growth accelerates with each step.

twist.text: Bacteria double every hour. After 24 hours, one cell becomes over 16 million. Geometric growth explodes.

climax.text: Compound interest, viral spread, and radioactive decay all follow geometric sequences.

punchline.text: Multiply by the same factor, and small numbers become giants.

quiz.question: What is the common ratio in the sequence 3, 12, 48, 192?
